text.title: Outcome Based Roadmaps Advanced Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Outcome Based Roadmaps Advanced. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: draw-multi-q-chain
step.action: Link outcomes across quarters with edges.

step.name: classify-dependencies
step.action: Per edge: classify hard/soft + write rationale.

step.name: apply-confidence-decay
step.action: Cap Q+3 at low unless cited evidence.

step.name: lane-portfolio
step.action: Assign each outcome to its product swim lane.

step.name: publish-and-quarter-review
step.action: Publish; review at each quarter close.

decision-gate.p: After step 5, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
